{{Infobox character
| name = Ekerinatoth
| appears_in = Cradle
| abilities = Enforcer technique, Ruler technique
| affiliations = gold dragons
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ekerinatoth, often referred to by the shortened name [[Ekeri]], is a member of the gold [[dragon]] bloodline. She is a formidable combatant who utilizes a technique known as the [[Path of the Flowing Flame]] and can manifest liquid, golden whips from her hands. In battle, she is characterized by a lethal intent and a lack of mercy, often accompanied by two [[Lowgold]] assistants intended to prevent her targets from escaping. Her physical appearance includes golden scales and she has been seen wearing [[jade]]-colored silk robes adorned with necklaces. She also carries a specialized weapon resembling a [[sword]] hilt attached to a long, thick needle. [[Ekeri]] utilizes portable shelters constructed from [[Forged madra]] and possesses the ability to use a [[void key]] to store her belongings.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ekerinatoth is a [[dragon]]-turtle belonging to the gold [[dragons]]. Appearing as a dragon-girl with golden scales, she wields a unique weapon consisting of a long needle attached to a [[sword]]'s hilt. During combat, she utilizes both [[Enforcer]] and [[Ruler techniques]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]] is a [[dragon]]-turtle.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]] is of the gold [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]] is a dragon-girl with golden scales.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]] uses a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekerinatoth]]'s weapon is a long needle with a [[sword]]'s hilt.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“Ekerinatoth of the gold dragons,” he announced as he emerged.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Gold dragons]]
